meaning: n.勇气v.拔去(鸡、鸭等)毛,采集
examples: Tha's got too much pluck in thee.
It takes a lot of pluck to start a new job at his age.
When you get hungry, just pluck a pear off the tree and eat it.
Under the heat of the Mexican sun, I watched the guys pluck their strings.
Workers pluck parts from prestocked boxes already arranged in the order they need them.
